_comment: Effective irreversible decomposition risk model for high-voltage screening.
This layer is intentionally heuristic: it translates the idea that once a
molecule is sufficiently oxidized, bond cleavage / ring opening / radical
follow-up chemistry can become the real stability limiter.
The onset values below are screening parameters in V vs Li/Li+.
Use them as formulation-triage inputs, not final mechanistic truth.
